## Measures

- Stamping out
- Epidemiological investigation
- Phylogenetic examination
- Wild birds
- Awareness-raising and information-spreading

<!-- image -->

Chicken with a wink and the words "Madarın Fluenzat"

## Measures

- Closed keeping -high risk counties (7) -from 10 October 2025 -still in force
- Transport -whole area of Bács-Kiskun, Csongrád-Csanád and Békés -before movement of waterfowls to slaughterhouse (swab -72 h, have to wait the result)
- Transport -whole country -before technological movement of waterfowls (swab -72 h, have to wait the result)

<!-- image -->

<!-- image -->

## Measures

- Stocking-restocking
- waterfowls only under strict conditions -free areas of affected counties
- only poultry can be stocked which are transported to immeadiate slaughter (no further keeping)
- self-checklists are required (signed also by the private veterinarian) -approval by the  Poulty  Product  Board  (members) -declaration  of  the  integrator  -  on-spot audit by the local and regional authority
- on farms which have been positive at least 3 times from 2020 can be stocked after a strict on-spot control of NDCC, CGO, PPB and each of them must approve
- those waterfowls  holdings within the affected counties which have had an outbreak during  an  epidemic  cannot repopulate their holdings till the whole country regains its freedom as required by WOAH.

<!-- image -->

AGRARMINISZTERIUM

<!-- image -->

## Additional measures

- Compensation
- bonus-malus system (owners, who implements certain extra measures get higher compensation), base rate is 60%
- the compensation rate is maximum 80% of the proposed amount for poultry keepers
- Aid for ceasing operations
- Legal requirement to keep a certain distance between existing and new holdings

<!-- image -->

<!-- image -->

<!-- image -->

(Image Description)

The image depicts a large group of ducks in the water, with two large birds flying above them. The ducks are spread out across the water, with some ducks closer to the shore and others further out. The birds are all black and white, with some having white feathers on their heads and necks. The water is calm, with small ripples indicating movement in the water. The background is blurred, focusing attention on the ducks and the birds.

Credit: Szabolcs Gál
